hero.lead: Air, ocean, road, customs, warehousing, and 3PL — GOODMAN GLS designs and executes every move for cargo entering, leaving, or moving through Korea.

why.lead: GOODMAN GLS brings every link of the supply chain — air, ocean, road, customs, warehousing, and 3PL — into one operating desk for Korea-linked cargo. You get a single accountable partner instead of fragmented handoffs.

sales.title: Multimodal transport
sales.description: We combine air, ocean, and road into the optimal mix — balancing speed and cost for every shipment.

capacity.title: Customs & compliance
capacity.description: Import/export clearance, tariff classification, and regulatory handling so your cargo moves through without delay.

intelligence.title: Warehousing & 3PL
intelligence.description: Storage, inventory management, value-added processing, and last-mile delivery — operated as one integrated service.

digital.title: Digital visibility
digital.description: Real-time tracking, dashboards, and API connectivity that keep your cargo transparent across its entire journey.

gsa.title: Airline Partnerships
gsa.lead: On top of our integrated logistics, we hold direct partnerships with 15+ airlines — dedicated commercial support in Korea for carriers, and reliable capacity for forwarders.

services.lead: Six core services spanning your cargo's entire journey. We deliver velocity and trust in every shipment.

air.name: Air Freight
air.description: Express and time-critical air cargo with priority booking through direct airline partnerships.

ocean.name: Ocean Freight
ocean.description: Full container load (FCL), less than container load (LCL), and specialized container services worldwide.

land.name: Land Transport
land.description: Nationwide trucking and inland multimodal transport, connected seamlessly to air and ocean legs.

customs.name: Customs Brokerage
customs.description: Import/export clearance, HS classification, duty optimization, and FTA utilization handled end to end.

warehouse.name: Warehousing & 3PL

project.name: Project Cargo
project.description: Specialized handling for oversized, heavy, and high-value project shipments.

company.lead: Since 2014, GOODMAN GLS has grown into an integrated logistics company spanning air, ocean, road, customs, and warehousing. Backed by ECS Group, we rival companies many times our size through technical precision and local expertise.

company.ceoQuote: "In logistics, every shipment carries not just cargo, but our clients' trust and reputation."

hero.subheadline: 5 airlines. 59 countries via ECS Group. One dedicated cargo team in Korea.

whyGssa.title: We Think Like an Airline. We Act Like Your Team.
whyGssa.description: A GSSA is not a middleman. We are your dedicated commercial team in Korea — selling your capacity, managing your brand, and growing your revenue as if it were our own business.
whyGssa.definitionBody: We handle everything — from cargo sales and pricing to capacity management and customer relationships. Airlines gain a fully operational commercial team in Korea without the overhead of building one.
whyGssa.whyBody: Our airline partners see immediate impact: increased load factors, stronger forwarder relationships, and real-time market intelligence that drives revenue growth. 10+ years of track record in Korea, with leadership bringing 38+ years of airline cargo experience.

sales.title: In the Market
sales.description: We sell smart, act fast, and deliver consistently. Our local teams know every forwarder, every route, every opportunity in Korea.

capacity.title: In the Air
capacity.description: Dynamic pricing, yield optimization, and strategic space allocation that maximizes your revenue per flight.

intelligence.title: On the Ground
intelligence.description: Trade flow analysis, seasonal forecasting, competitive benchmarking, and regulatory intelligence — updated weekly.

digital.title: In the Cloud
digital.description: Real-time dashboards, API connectivity, digital booking platforms, and performance analytics at your fingertips.

services.title: Beyond GSSA — Full Logistics Capability

services.heroLead: From air and ocean to road, customs, and warehousing, we deliver a full spectrum of logistics services designed for the most demanding supply chains. Small giant, big impact.
services.ctaLead: Whether it's a one-off express shipment, a full 3PL program, or a complex multi-year project, our team is ready to deliver.

bridgeLogis.eyebrow: Digital quoting platform by Goodman GLS
bridgeLogis.title: BridgeLogis connects forwarders to instant express freight quotes.
bridgeLogis.lead: BridgeLogis is Goodman GLS' smart quote platform for forwarding partners. Visitors can compare available UPS and DHL express tariff options, calculate Door-to-Door and Door-to-Airport estimates, and review exchange rates, FSC, packing, and add-on service assumptions in one transparent view.
bridgeLogis.caveat: Carrier names are shown for tariff comparison only. Final service availability, surcharges, acceptance, and pricing remain subject to each carrier's latest rules and Goodman GLS' final quotation.
bridgeLogis.ctaAria: Open BridgeLogis in a new tab to compare express freight rates

instantQuotes.title: Instant freight quotes
instantQuotes.desc: Calculate Door-to-Door and Door-to-Airport estimates instantly with carrier-by-carrier comparison for the best available route.

transparentBreakdown.title: Transparent cost breakdown
transparentBreakdown.desc: International freight, fuel surcharge, packing, handling, pickup, and margin are itemized so partners can explain every line with confidence.

verifiedRates.title: Verified rate structure
verifiedRates.desc: Built on real carrier rate logic with live exchange-rate and FSC workflows, giving forwarders a practical quoting desk powered by Goodman GLS.

air.name: Air Freight
air.overview: Our air freight division specializes in time-critical and temperature-sensitive cargo. With direct partnerships across major airlines, we secure priority booking and competitive rates.
air.caseChallenge: 72-hour delivery window for critical manufacturing equipment
air.caseSolution: Direct charter arrangement with specialized packaging

ocean.name: Ocean Freight
ocean.overview: Full-service ocean freight including FCL, LCL, and specialized container services. Our network reaches every major port worldwide.
ocean.caseChallenge: Oversized machinery requiring a specialized container
ocean.caseSolution: Flat rack container with custom securing arrangements

land.name: Land Transport
land.overview: Nationwide trucking and inland multimodal transport that connects seamlessly to your air and ocean legs — closing the first and last mile with full visibility.
land.caseChallenge: Same-week delivery to 12 distribution centers after import clearance
land.caseSolution: Cross-dock at port with consolidated regional trucking

customs.name: Customs Brokerage
customs.overview: Licensed import/export clearance with proactive compliance. We classify, optimize duties, and clear your cargo without surprises or delays.
customs.caseChallenge: High duties on recurring component imports
customs.caseSolution: Korea-EU FTA origin verification and reclassification
customs.caseResult: Duty reduced to 0% on qualifying lines

warehouse.name: Warehousing & 3PL
warehouse.overview: Bonded and general warehousing with full 3PL operations — storage, inventory management, value-added processing, and order fulfillment under one roof.
warehouse.caseChallenge: Peak-season order volume with next-day expectations
warehouse.caseSolution: Dedicated WMS lane with regional last-mile partners

project.name: Project Cargo
project.overview: Specialized project logistics for oversized, heavy-lift, and high-value cargo. Full project management from planning to final installation.
project.caseSolution: Combined sea, river barge, and specialized road transport

network.heroLead: Connected to over 59 countries through elite logistics networks, agent partners, and strategic alliances. We provide the infrastructure for end-to-end global commerce.
network.mplDesc: Premium logistics network focused on quality service and innovation across Asia-Pacific.
network.eanDesc: Elite network of air cargo logistics providers committed to service excellence and innovation.
network.gssaLead: Alongside our integrated logistics, we hold direct partnerships with 15+ airlines, securing capacity and routes across the Northeast Asian corridor.
network.ecsLead: Through our strategic partnership with ECS Group, we extend our integrated logistics with access to one of the world's largest cargo networks.

company.heroLead: We aren't the biggest, but we aim to be the most impactful. Founded on the principle that logistics is a people business, we've spent a decade proving that trust is earned, not given.
company.ceoQuote: Small Giant, Big Impact. That's our North Star.
company.ceoP1: Welcome to GOODMAN GLS. Since our founding in 2014, we've built our reputation on a simple principle: trust through action.
company.ceoP2: As an integrated logistics company, we connect Korea to the world — moving cargo across air, ocean, road, customs, and warehousing as a single accountable partner.
company.ceoP3: Our team of logistics professionals brings decades of combined experience across every mode of transport. We understand that every shipment carries not just cargo, but our clients' reputation.
company.ceoBio: 38+ years in air cargo; former executive at Korean Air & Asiana Airlines Cargo. Architect of the GOODMAN service model.
company.teamLead: Our advantage is our team. We've brought together the sharpest minds in Korean air freight to ensure your cargo—and your reputation—is in the right hands.

2014.desc: Started in air cargo with a vision to redefine logistics in the Korean market.

2015.desc: Secured our first airline representation, proving the 'Small Giant' model works.

2018.desc: Joined MarcoPoloLine Group and Exclusive Air Network to expand global reach.

2020.desc: Expanded into heavy-lift and specialized cargo for industrial partners.

2025.desc: Investing in next-gen technology for real-time partner transparency.

trust.desc: Earned through consistent delivery and total transparency.

velocity.desc: Speed matters in time-critical logistics. We move faster.

connectivity.desc: Global reach through our elite strategic partnerships.
